summary: Implemented and ran a minimal GLib/GDBus portal ScreenCast helper against a node-scoped Hyprland output. The helper received the CreateSession response and extracted the session_handle, but SelectSources did not respond within the bounded 30-second wait. No stream ids or OpenPipeWireRemote fd were reached, and PipeWire showed no video/portal/madobe stream. The node completes with a sharper blocker and leaves m2-capture-one-frame blocked.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Uses the node-scoped madobe output and disposable workspace setup with cleanup evidence.
Captures the portal response and returned stream ids from a consented ScreenCast session, or documents the exact manual UI or environment blocker.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: rerun5-portal-client.txt captures CreateSession response and SelectSources timeout; blocker.md records that no consented stream ids were returned.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Calls OpenPipeWireRemote or records the exact blocker before that call.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: validation-summary.json records OpenPipeWireRemote was not reached because SelectSources timed out.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Captures PipeWire stream or node metadata sufficient to decide whether m2-capture-one-frame can proceed.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: rerun5-pipewire-after-summary.json shows no video/portal/madobe stream; validation-summary.json keeps m2-capture-one-frame blocked.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Does not add third-party Rust dependencies without a separate dependency-policy finding or node.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: Only evidence/report files and a local C helper artifact were added; Cargo manifests are unchanged.

commandsRun.command: gcc portal_screencast_client.c with GLib/GIO flags from Nix store pkg-config
pw-dump focused summary after portal client

realWorldValidation.evidence: Live Linux Hyprland, portal, and PipeWire probes were collected. The result is a documented SelectSources timeout blocker rather than a successful stream capture.

residualRisks: The portal chooser may require visible user interaction or a parent window context that this helper did not provide.
No stream ids, PipeWire remote fd, DMA-BUF format, modifier, timestamp, or sync metadata were obtained.
